controls.title: Public-record-only operating boundary
controls.evidence: Current public cases use official institutional records and no real victim evidence.

controls.title: Data minimisation and purpose limitation
controls.evidence: Public graphs omit private addresses and case packs expose a redaction profile.

controls.title: Source provenance and immutable snapshot design
controls.evidence: v0.3 records canonical URL, retrieval time, SHA-256 and parser version.

controls.title: Human review before consequential publication
controls.evidence: v0.5 blocks AI-only claims and applies stronger gates to sensitive claims.

controls.title: Monitoring cannot silently alter public status
controls.evidence: v0.7 source changes remain pending review.

controls.title: Reviewed PDF and JSON case packs
controls.evidence: v0.8 validates reviewed findings, sources, redaction and limitations.

controls.title: Independent threat-model review
controls.evidence: Draft threat model exists; no independent reviewer has approved it.

controls.title: Authentication and least-privilege role-based access
controls.evidence: Required roles and permissions are specified; no sensitive-data system is deployed.

controls.title: Encryption and managed key lifecycle
controls.evidence: No production evidence store or key-management service exists.

controls.title: Tamper-evident audit logs and access review
controls.evidence: Git history covers public code; sensitive-case access auditing is not implemented.

controls.title: Retention, deletion and legal-hold controls
controls.evidence: Draft policy exists; no enforceable production lifecycle exists.

controls.title: Lawful-basis, consent and data-subject workflow
controls.evidence: Must be scoped with the partner, case type and competent data-protection reviewer.

controls.title: Data-protection impact assessment where required
controls.evidence: Cannot be completed until the actual partner, data and processing purpose are defined.

controls.title: Independent privacy, defamation and publication review
controls.evidence: Methodology defines legal and reply gates; no qualified external reviewer has approved the operating model.

controls.title: Incident-response plan tested through an exercise
controls.evidence: Draft response plan exists; no tabletop exercise or external test has occurred.

controls.title: Backup, recovery and evidence-integrity restoration test
controls.evidence: No production data store exists to test.

controls.title: Qualified pilot partner with signed roles and escalation routes
controls.evidence: No partner has yet accepted responsibility for a controlled case workflow.

controls.title: Independent security assessment of deployed pilot
controls.evidence: Must evaluate the actual deployment, not only the repository design.
